brand.name: RIVAN REALITY LLP
brand.tagline: Legacy of trust, legacy of wealth

typography.strategy: Premium real estate pairing. Serif for authoritative, legacy-driven headings. Geometric sans-serif for mobile readability and modern data display.

buttons.primary: Solid #0B5D1E background, White text. Large hit area (minHeight 52px). Radii: md (8px). Used for primary conversions (Book Plot, Pay Now).
buttons.secondary: Outline button with 1.5px #F08A2E border and #F08A2E text. Transparent background. Used for secondary actions (Schedule Visit, WhatsApp).
buttons.ghost: Text only, no background, #0B5D1E text, used for 'View All' or subtle navigation.

inputs.text_field: Flat design. Bottom border only or full 1px border with #E5E7E5. Background #F9FAF9. Active state changes border to #0B5D1E.
inputs.dropdown: Do not use standard mobile picker. Use a trigger that opens a bottom sheet selector for a premium feel.

cards.property_listing: Cardless or minimal border look. Image takes up top 65%, wrapped in 16px radius. Minimalist typography below. Soft shadow (elevation: 2) on Android, diffuse shadow on iOS.
cards.installment_status: Horizontal card layout. Left accent bar colored based on status (Green/Red/Yellow). White background, 8px radius.
cards.service_tile: Square bento box layout. Centered vector icon (Deep Forest Green). Used for Property Services grid.

interactive_plot_map.container: Pinch-to-zoom enabled React Native ScrollView or Reanimated container.
interactive_plot_map.plots: Rounded rectangular SVG/View elements. Fill color dictated by status (available/reserved/booked/sold).
interactive_plot_map.interaction: On press, highlight plot (scale 1.05) and invoke Bottom Sheet with plot details, dimensions, and 'Book Now' CTA.

navigation.bottom_tabs: Crisp white background. Active icon: #0B5D1E. Inactive icon: #9CA3AF. Hide label or use 10px uppercase Manrope.
navigation.header: Clean white background, #052F0F title, minimal back arrow. If over hero image, use linear gradient transparent overlay.

screens.auth: White screen. Large Rivan logo. Simple mobile input, bold 'Send OTP' primary button. No heavy backgrounds, maintain high trust.
screens.home: Sticky header (Location + Notifications). Horizontal scroll 'Featured' large cards. Category pills (Apartments, Plots, Villas). Vertical feed of property listings.
screens.property_details: Immersive image gallery hero. Title + Price + Tags below. Floating bottom action bar with 'Book Plot' and 'Schedule Visit'.
screens.payments_dashboard: Top summary card (dark forest green background, white text for 'Balance'). Two tabs: 'Upcoming', 'History'. List of installment cards.
screens.my_land: Grid or list of owned assets. Each card has quick actions: 'Request Service', 'View Documents'.
screens.services: Bento grid of service categories (Cleaning, CCTV, etc.). Tap opens a simple request form.
screens.experience_centre: Map view or list of nearby centres. 'Book Slot' secondary buttons.

iconography.usage: Stroke weight 1.5. Clean, unfilled geometric shapes.

animations.interactions: Pressables scale down to 0.96 (spring animation) instead of standard opacity fade.
animations.transitions: Slide up for modals and bottom sheets. Slide horizontal for stack navigation.
animations.loading: Skeleton loaders (shimmer effect in stone_200) instead of generic spinners.

property_villas.description: Contemporary villa with pool and garden, showcasing luxury and modern architecture
Brown and white concrete modern house

property_plots.description: Lush green field with palm trees
Aerial view of green open plots

experience_centre.description: Interior of modern office with contemporary wooden tables

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text over backgrounds. White text over Forest Green and Orange is AA compliant.
accessibility_and_testing.test_attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' (or 'testID' in React Native) attribute. Examples: 'login-submit-button', 'home-property-card-1', 'plot-book-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Native StyleSheet for styling, mirroring the design tokens provided here.
For the interactive plot map, implement a ScrollView with maximumZoomScale/minimumZoomScale or use react-native-gesture-handler for pinch-to-zoom.
Do not use generic UI libraries that look like cheap templates; build custom components matching the Archetype 5 (Luxury) theme.
Ensure 'data-testid' or 'testID' is added to every pressable, text input, and major view container.
The plot color coding is strict: Green (#10B981) for available, Yellow (#F59E0B) for reserved, Blue (#3B82F6) for booked, and Red (#EF4444) for sold.
